description: Build a hedonic pricing model for San Francisco buildings using the UrbanSim framework in the Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/hedonic_model.ipynb. Predict residential_sales_price (synthetically generated) using an OLS regression model with at least three building features from the 'buildings' table in /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. The analysis must handle missing values by dropping NaN rows and include a regression summary with R-squared and coefficients. Export the model coefficients (variable, coefficient, std_error, and p_value) to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/hedonic_coefficients.csv and save a scatter plot of predicted vs actual
